DP World and the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD) sign a loan agreement of up to €25 million to support the electrification of operations at DP World’s Constanța South Container Terminal in Romania. The financing represents the terminal’s first dedicated green loan and forms part of a €100 million investment programme that reduces CO₂ emissions by more than 6,000 tonnes per year.
